sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91525" key="pucio/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυξῐόπους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">πουν</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <sense id="n91525.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with feet of box-wood</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κλίνη</foreign> Roussel <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Cultes Egyptiens</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1458.tlg001:221" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">221</biblScope> </bibl> (Delos, <date TEIform="date">ii B.C.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
